summary.default_posture: HTTP/3 uses static-only QPACK by default.
summary.opt_in_posture: Dynamic QPACK field-section references are supported through H3QpackMode::DynamicTableAllowed plus QpackContext.
summary.parity_boundary: Full QPACK encoder/decoder instruction-stream parity and blocked-stream scheduling are not advertised as shipped production parity.

evidence: H3Settings encode/decode preserves QPACK capacity, blocked-stream, max-field-section, DATAGRAM, Extended CONNECT, and unknown settings.
H3ConnectionState enforces duplicate SETTINGS and control-stream frame restrictions.
source_markers: duplicate SETTINGS on remote control stream

evidence: SETTINGS_H3_DATAGRAM and SETTINGS_ENABLE_CONNECT_PROTOCOL are parsed, encoded, and validated at the native HTTP/3 protocol layer.
This matrix does not claim a full QUIC DATAGRAM transport implementation beyond the native HTTP/3 frame/settings surface.
Static-only mode rejects nonzero dynamic-table capacity and blocked-stream settings.
source_markers: qpack blocked streams must be zero in static-only mode
dynamic qpack table disabled by policy

evidence: Dynamic QPACK field-section encoding and decoding are available when the caller supplies QpackContext and enables H3QpackMode::DynamicTableAllowed.
Tests cover dynamic table capacity, eviction, reference protection, required-insert-count bounds, and relative-index resolution.
QPACK string literals reuse the HPACK Huffman encoder/decoder and select Huffman when it is smaller.
Tests cover decoding Huffman strings in static mode.
Remote QPACK encoder and decoder unidirectional streams are recognized and duplicate stream creation is rejected.
QPACK streams currently reject HTTP/3 frame mapping because QPACK instruction processing is a separate unadvertised parity boundary.
source_markers: qpack streams carry instructions, not h3 frames

evidence: The native HTTP/3 layer does not advertise full QPACK encoder/decoder instruction-stream parity.
Applications must not infer h3/quinn-level dynamic instruction processing from the presence of dynamic field-section helpers.
source_markers: qpack streams carry instructions, not h3 frames

evidence: Blocked-stream SETTINGS are parsed and policy-checked, but no production blocked-stream scheduler is advertised in this support matrix.
Dynamic field-section decoding fails closed when Required Insert Count exceeds the current dynamic table state.
source_markers: required insert count exceeds dynamic table state

validation_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_asupersync_rckh3q_contract cargo test -p asupersync --test http3_qpack_support_matrix_contract --features test-internals,http3 -- --nocapture
rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_asupersync_rckh3q_h3 cargo check -p asupersync --lib --features http3,test-internals
